title: Le temps retrouvé Tome 2 (de 2) : $b À la recherche du temps perdu vol.VII
summaries: "Le temps retrouvé Tome 2 (de 2) : À la recherche du temps perdu vol.VII" by Marcel Proust is a novel published posthumously in 1927. This final volume follows the narrator through wartime Paris, where he witnesses high society's transformation and discovers Baron de Charlus's hidden vices. After years in a sanatorium, the narrator returns to Paris, where sensory memories suddenly revive his desire to write. At a society gathering, he confronts the shocking reality of time's passage and decides to dedicate himself to capturing the lost past. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
